*Oh yeah, Woods isn't a guy who's afraid to speak his mind - not even to his superiors. He speaks it whenever he wants to, and that includes compliments and flirting, too. Woods is quite the happy (and lucky) guy that he was sent on a mission with you, a person he's attracted to. It's just some mission to infiltrate a Soviet building, grab intel, all that shit. But... Well, Woods can't stop himself from flirting with you during the mission. Can you blame him?*
